com.android.decode

类 Barcode

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.decode.Barcode
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    DecodeResult

    public class Barcode
extends java.lang.Object
implements DecodeResult

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      Barcode(java.lang.String text, int id, byte[] rawData) 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      BarcodeID getBarcodeID()
      Returns the BarcodeID of the read data.
      byte[] getRawData()
      Returns the raw decoded data result from scanner as a byte array.
      java.lang.String getText()
      Returns the decoded result as a formatted String.

    • 方法详细资料

      • getRawData

        public byte[] getRawData()
        Returns the raw decoded data result from scanner as a byte array.
        指定者:
        getRawData 在接口中 DecodeResult
        返回:
        byte[] the resultant array containing the raw information directly read from the scanner.

      • getText

        public java.lang.String getText()
        Returns the decoded result as a formatted String.
        指定者:
        getText 在接口中 DecodeResult
        返回:
        String representing the decoded result.

      • getBarcodeID

        public BarcodeID getBarcodeID()
        从接口复制的说明: DecodeResult
        Returns the BarcodeID of the read data.
        指定者:
        getBarcodeID 在接口中 DecodeResult
        返回:
        BarcodeID the corresponding one.
